item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – Episode 400 Jubilee: Our 7-Year Journey and Live Insights from PZF 2026
item.description:
400 episodes. Seven years. One podcast tracking the transformation of money from the front row.

In this milestone episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll, Michael Blaschke, Manuel Klein, Jonas Gross, Stefan Grasmann and Jonathan Knoll look back on a journey that began in 2019 as a German-language experiment and evolved into a global platform for digital money, tokenization, institutional DLT and the architecture of finance.

The team reflects on the guests, debates and turning points that shaped BFRR: from Libra and the rise of CBDCs to MiCA, stablecoins, tokenized deposits, DeFi and the move from experimentation toward institutional adoption. They revisit memorable conversations, discuss what they got right—and where timing proved harder to predict—and share what seven years of weekly publishing have taught them about technology, regulation and financial infrastructure.

The second half takes listeners to the Point Zero Forum 2026 in Zurich, where BFRR served as an official media partner. The team shares its takeaways and brings together voices from finance, technology and policy around three questions: What was the most important idea at the conference? What surprised people or changed their minds? And what crucial topic is still missing from the conversation?

The answers reveal an industry entering a new phase. Interoperability is increasingly a governance challenge, not merely a technical one. Stablecoins, tokenized deposits and central bank money may coexist rather than compete. Agentic payments are raising urgent questions around liability and identity. Post-quantum security is moving from a distant concern to a concrete deadline. Across the board, the focus is shifting from proofs of concept to production, scale and real economic use cases.

Episode 400 is both a celebration and a reality check: progress has been slower than many expected, but the direction of travel is clearer than ever. The debate is no longer whether institutions will adopt digital assets and DLT, but how fast, on which infrastructure and under whose rules.

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel Inside the ECB’ s Digital Euro Project and Stablecoins with Ulrich Bindseil From Libra to Legitimacy: Circle’s Stablecoin R(e)volution From Citi Bank to Stablecoins: Tony McLaughlin's Bold Pivot Reclaiming Digital Sovereignty in Europe - and the Role of the Digital Euro Permissionless blockchains for financial services A journey through the era of digital money with Rod Garratt [US vs EU: The Stablecoin Policy Divide]x(https://open.spotify.com/episode/7D5r1pOxLf31tQDocCiTQi?si=kEZ1yZ7IRIm-bZWh0dx3LA))

Relai*: Buy Bitcoin with Relai—you can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll.

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own research—inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: Once Bitten! A Bitcoin Podcast. – A My Fisrt Bitcoin Node In Cordoba, Argentina! Trevor Schrock
item.description:
Grass roots Bitcoin Education is spreading around the world.

$ BTC 60,260

Block Height 956,255

Today's guest on the show is Trevor Schrock, the founder of Bitcoin School Argentina, based in Córdoba.

Trevor shares his personal journey, revealing he was born in Southern California but has strong family ties to Córdoba, Argentina, where his father was born.

He first encountered MyFirstBitcoin's open-source educational materials while living in Mexico City and was inspired to return to Argentina, seeing its ripe conditions for Bitcoin adoption

Key Topics:

  • Trevor Schrock's personal journey to Bitcoin and move to Argentina.
  • The founding and mission of Bitcoin School Argentina.
  • Argentina's unique economic context, hyperinflation, and the "currency competition."
  • Adaptation and use of MyFirstBitcoin open-source educational materials.
  • Challenges and successes of running a Bitcoin education center.
  • The importance of physical spaces and community meetups for Bitcoin education.
  • Advice and inspiration for starting local Bitcoin education initiatives.

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – Arrested and Debanked in Germany, Free in El Salvador: A Warning to Every Bitcoin Maxi in Europe | Michael Ballweg
item.description:
What if the government used debanking and digital surveillance to silence you? Michael Ballweg (@Michael_Ballweg), founder of Querdenken, rebuilt on a Bitcoin standard in El Salvador and is now fighting for local AI and data sovereignty while Europe tightens its grip on free speech and privacy protection.

Michael took a 180-person rally in Stuttgart and grew it into 1.3 million people in Berlin with Robert Kennedy Jr. on stage, all under the banner of free speech and the right to peacefully assemble. The German government responded by sending the Verfassungsschutz, Germany's constitutional protection agency, to monitor him, label him an extremist, and eventually raid his home on fraud charges that prosecutors spent years trying to make stick.

What followed was nine months in Stammheim prison, the same facility built for RAF terrorists in the 1970s, with no finalized charge, no bank account, no house, and no company infrastructure left standing. Full debanking meant living on cash and Bitcoin for nearly four years, and that forced experiment turned Michael into one of the most practically tested voices alive on what government overreach actually costs when it targets someone who keeps saying no.

After a 44-day trial and a complete acquittal on every meaningful charge, Michael and his wife landed in El Salvador and never looked back. Living on a Bitcoin standard here means a 12-cent transaction that clears in 10 minutes with nobody's permission required, and that experience makes the old banking system feel less like a convenience and more like a leash he's glad to have cut.

His focus now sits at the intersection of privacy protection and decentralized technology, watching centralized AI absorb the same power Big Tech used to capture the open internet in the 1990s. He's building with local AI tools that keep data out of corporate servers, using privacy-first devices for his Bitcoin stack, and watching Europe quietly roll out mandatory digital ID while most people are still arguing about whether any of it matters.


—Bitcoin Beach Team


Learn more about Michael Ballweg:
X: https://x.com/michael_ballweg
Web: https://michael-ballweg.de/en/
Web: https://digitaler-aktivist.org/
Patreon: https://presse.querdenken-711.de/en/home/


Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach 
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com 


Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
0:00 Intro
1:23 Who is Michael Ballweg and what is the Querdenken movement?
5:10 Did European governments coordinate COVID protest bans?
6:27 How did Querdenken grow to 1.3 million people in Berlin with RFK Jr.?
13:18 Why was a German protest organizer arrested for money laundering and fraud?
19:41 What happens to your assets when the German government raids your home?
26:13 How did Michael Ballweg win acquittal after nine months in Stammheim prison?
34:07 Why are Bitcoiners leaving Europe and moving to El Salvador?
38:51 How do you live on a Bitcoin standard when banks refuse to open your account?
43:47 Is centralized AI the next big censorship threat after social media? 

Live From Bitcoin Beach

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin for Millennials – Did Michael Saylor Destroy Bitcoin's Sentiment? | Michael Sullivan | BFM264
item.description:
Michael Sullivan is an engineer studying the emotional state of the Bitcoin market using language analysis. Writing about his weekly findings on his Substack.

› https://x.com/SullyMichaelvan

› https://sentimentsully.substack.com

› https://x.com/bramk

🕑 TIMESTAMPS

00:00 - The Bullish Case for Bad Vibes
05:56 - Analyzing Sentiment in Bitcoin Communities
09:00 - Measuring Sentiment Through Language
11:51 - Excitement and Desire in Bitcoin
15:00 - The Emotional Landscape of Bitcoin Markets
29:01 - The Evolution of Bitcoin Community Emotions
33:09 - The Anti-Fragility of Bitcoin's Diverse Perspectives
37:33 - The Emergence of New Terms in Bitcoin Discourse

52:31 - Touch Points: The Journey to Bitcoin Understanding
54:58 - Sentiment Analysis: Understanding Market Emotions


ℹ️ EPISODE SUMMARY

Bram Kanstein and Michael Sullivan discuss why terrible Bitcoin vibes can be a bullish signal. Sullivan reveals how he quantifies sentiment from X language, filtering bots by tracking individuals and cohorts. They challenge the four-year cycle as a story people act out, not a law of nature. From OG vs pleb excitement gaps to desire and disapproval spikes, the data maps tops and bottoms. They confront Bitcoin infighting, Saylor’s camps, and what sovereignty means when institutions pile in.

]]>

29:01 - The Evolution of Bitcoin Community Emotions
33:09 - The Anti-Fragility of Bitcoin's Diverse Perspectives
37:33 - The Emergence of New Terms in Bitcoin Discourse
40:25 - Saylor's Framework: Capitalists vs. Fundamentalists
45:13 - The Role of Capitalists in Bitcoin Adoption
49:43 - Diverse Uses of Bitcoin: A Path to Broader Adoption
52:31 - Touch Points: The Journey to Bitcoin Understanding
54:58 - Sentiment Analysis: Understanding Market Emotions


ℹ️ EPISODE SUMMARY

Bram Kanstein and Michael Sullivan discuss why terrible Bitcoin vibes can be a bullish signal. Sullivan reveals how he quantifies sentiment from X language, filtering bots by tracking individuals and cohorts. They challenge the four-year cycle as a story people act out, not a law of nature. From OG vs pleb excitement gaps to desire and disapproval spikes, the data maps tops and bottoms. They confront Bitcoin infighting, Saylor’s camps, and what sovereignty means when institutions pile in.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal – 2392: $143T Bitcoin Opportunity - Governments Are Next
item.description:
Bitcoin is knocking on the door of a $143 trillion market. A proposed $100 million Bitcoin-backed municipal bond is moving through New Hampshire's political process, potentially opening the door for Bitcoin to be used as collateral behind government financing.

Meanwhile, BlackRock has flipped back to buying Bitcoin, spot ETFs have purchased more than $500 million over three days after massive outflows, and Charles Schwab says Strategy selling Bitcoin may actually ease fears of cascading liquidations. Plus, Senator Cynthia Lummis warns the Clarity Act may be America's last chance for meaningful digital asset legislation before 2030 as the SEC moves toward greater regulatory clarity.

📺 Prefer video? Watch daily Bitcoin breakdowns: http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: Münzweg - der Bitcoin-Podcast – Münzgasse #71 Auf der Suche nach Magic Internet Money (mit Jan-Paul, Lightrider & Lawrence)
item.description:
Manu hat in letzter Zeit viel erlebt, viel beobachtet – und noch mehr Fragen im Kopf. Taugt Bitcoin wirklich als Zahlungsmittel im Alltag? Nicht als Theorie, nicht als Wunschdenken, sondern da draußen, wo echte Menschen echtes Geld ausgeben?

Für die letzte Münzgasse vor der Sommerpause hat er sich deshalb drei Gäste eingeladen, die diese Frage nicht aus dem Lehrbuch beantworten – sondern aus dem Maschinenraum. Jan-Paul von Bitrefill, Lightrider von Nadanada und Lawrence von Shopinbit sitzen täglich mitten drin. Sie sehen die Zahlen, sie spüren die Trends, und sie reden heute ungewohnt offen darüber, was wirklich passiert, welches Geld ihre Kunden bevorzugen.

Diese Folge ist kein Hype, kein Bashing – sie ist ein ehrlicher Blick auf den Stand der Dinge. Mit drei Unternehmen, die für sich selbst sprechen können, weil sie den Beweis tagtäglich antreten müssen.

Perfekt für alle, die weniger reden und mehr wissen wollen.

Einen schönen Sommer – und bis nach der Pause.

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts – Marktupdate #60 | Bitcoin steigt wieder… doch genau jetzt wird es gefährlich
item.description:
(Partner-Tipp) 📅 Steuerfrist 31. Juli! Erledige deine Krypto-Steuer mit Blockpit und sichere dir 15 % Rabatt mit BTC-ECHO. ➡️ https://www.blockpit.io/de-de/lp/btc-echo

Während sich Bitcoin zuletzt bis über 64.500 US-Dollar zurückkämpfen konnte, geraten die Finanzmärkte erneut unter Druck. Gewinnmitnahmen bei US-Tech-Aktien, ein weltweiter Ausverkauf im Halbleitersektor und neue Spannungen im Nahen Osten sorgen für Unsicherheit.

Kann Bitcoin diese Belastungsfaktoren abschütteln und die historisch starke Juli-Phase fortsetzen? Oder war die jüngste Erholung nur eine kurze Verschnaufpause?

Im heutigen Folge analysiert Stefan Lübeck die aktuelle Marktlage, wichtige On-Chain-Daten und die spannendsten Entwicklungen am Kryptomarkt.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – Bukele, Bitcoin & Wall Street: The Fight for the Future of Civilization | Max Keiser & Stacy Herbert
item.description:
Max Keiser and Stacy Herbert join THE Bitcoin Podcast for a fiery, wide-ranging conversation on Bitcoin’s Wall Street problem, El Salvador’s renaissance, and the culture Bitcoin lost.

We discuss how President Nayib Bukele transformed El Salvador from a country defined by violence and despair into a global symbol of security, optimism, and Bitcoin-powered possibility. Max and Stacy explain why they see El Salvador as the leading example of a new freedom model built around Bitcoin, AI, education, energy, and strong governance.

The conversation also dives deep into Bitcoin’s financialization: Strategy/MSTR, Wall Street, ETFs, treasury companies, self-custody, “number go up” thinking, and the danger of reducing Bitcoin to just another asset on a brokerage screen. Along the way, we explore memes, cypherpunk culture, circular economies, AI, sovereignty, civilization, and why Bitcoin must remain rooted in freedom—not fiat nihilism.

Plus: Bitcoin Historico, Coco Max, fake chocolate bars, and why it’s all Matt Odell’s fault.

PARTNERS & DISCOUNTS:

  • LEDN: Bitcoin-backed lending. Go to ledn.io/walker and unlock liquidity WITHOUT selling your bitcoin.

Hyperliquid is already one of crypto’s biggest perp stories, but Multicoin’s Tushar Jain thinks the market may still be looking at it too narrowly. item.title: Stephan Livera Podcast – Bitcoin in Your Signal Chat – Radar’s Bold Move with Seth for Privacy | SLP754
item.description:
Radar integrates self-custodial Bitcoin payments directly into Signal's messaging network, eliminating the need for separate apps or custodians when sending value to contacts.

Seth for Privacy, from the Cake Wallet team, explains how Radar targets everyday users rather than Bitcoin maximalists by preserving Signal's privacy model while adding instant Lightning-enabled transfers via Spark.

The discussion covers seamless account migration from Signal, offline payment receives, wallet risk limits for non-critical funds, and the decision to pursue VC funding through a separate entity.

Timestamps:

00:49 — Why Messaging & Payments Stay Separate

03:34 — Migrate Signal Account Without Losing Data

08:18 — Send Bitcoin Instantly With One Tap

10:10 — Receive Payments Completely Offline

11:40 — Bitcoin for Everyone, Not Just Bitcoiners

14:21 — Don't Put Life Savings in Hot Wallet

17:10 — Signal Can't See Your Bitcoin Payments

19:13 — Donating Monthly to Signal Foundation

22:48 — Radar Takes VC Path Unlike Cake

Links: 

  • Radar Chat: https://radar.chat

  • @SethForPrivacy: https://x.com/sethforprivacy

  • Cake Wallet: https://cakewallet.com

Stephan Livera links:

  • Follow me on X: @stephanlivera

  • Subscribe to the podcast

  • Subscribe to Substack

]]>

item.title: Unchained – The Chopping Block: Tokens vs Equity, Lighter's Robinhood Perps Deal, and Trump's $2.4B Crypto Windfall
item.description:
Vladimir Novakovski of Lighter joins the Chopping Block crew to untangle one of crypto's oldest debates: what happens when tokens and equity coexist. The gang digs into the Venice/VVV controversy, breaks down Lighter's new Perps integration with Robinhood Chain and the fragmentation questions it raises, dissects the wild BonkDAO governance exploit, and reacts to the eye-popping $2.4 billion in crypto income disclosed in Trump's financial filings.


Welcome to The Chopping Block – where crypto insiders Haseeb Qureshi, Tom Schmidt, Tarun Chitra, and Robert Leshner chop it up about the latest in crypto, joined this week by special guest Vladimir Novakovski of Lighter.

The crew dives deep into the resurfaced tokens-versus-equity debate sparked by Dragonfly's investment in Venice and its VVV token, with Haseeb making the case that Venice is fundamentally different from Uniswap Labs style structures. Vlad explains how Lighter has approached the same dilemma through programmatic buybacks and a single C corp structure, and the group debates fiduciary duties, Delaware law, and what a merged DeFi/TradFi future for equity and tokens might look like. From there, they unpack Lighter's big Robinhood Chain announcement, including Lighter's new role as the native Perps engine inside Robinhood Wallet, and whether running a separate instance fragments liquidity. The episode wraps with a breakdown of the BonkDAO governance exploit that let an attacker vote themselves $20 million in tokens, and a reaction to Trump's staggering $2.4 billion in pre-tax crypto income revealed in his latest financial disclosure.


Listen to the episode on Apple Podcasts, Spotify, Pods, Fountain, Podcast Addict, Pocket Casts, Amazon Music, or on your favorite podcast platform.


Show highlights

🔹 Haseeb breaks down why Venice's VVV token is not equity and not a Uniswap style governance token in disguise

🔹 Vlad explains how Lighter's programmatic buybacks and single C corp structure align token holders and equity holders

🔹 The gang debates Delaware fiduciary law, shareholder primacy, and what happens when buyback capital runs dry

🔹 Vlad lays out the vision of tokenized equity merging with crypto tokens into a single on-chain asset

🔹 Lighter's Robinhood Chain deal goes live with Lighter powering native Perps trading inside Robinhood Wallet

🔹 Vlad addresses concerns about liquidity fragmentation across separate Lighter instances

🔹 BonkDAO gets exploited as an attacker buys governance tokens and votes themselves $20 million

🔹 Robert compares the Bonk exploit to the infamous Beanstalk and Compound Humpty governance attacks

🔹 Trump's financial disclosure reveals $2.4 billion in pre-tax crypto income, sparking a debate on crypto's political future


Hosts

⭐️Haseeb Qureshi, Managing Partner at Dragonfly

⭐️Tom Schmidt, General Partner at Dragonfly

⭐️Robert Leshner, Founder & CEO of Superstate

Guest

⭐️Vladimir Novakovski, Founder of Lighter


Timestamps

00:00 Intro

03:40 Tokens vs equity: the Venice VVV debate begins

06:12 Fiduciary duty, Delaware law, and Lighter's C corp structure

08:00 What happens when buyback capital runs out

12:42 Why Venice launched a token in the first place

19:18 Comparing VVV to BNB and overloaded crypto assets

25:28 Lighter's Robinhood Chain deal and native Perps launch

37:02 BonkDAO governance exploit and the $20M vote

44:02 Lessons from Beanstalk and Compound's Humpty saga

47:09 Trump's $2.4B crypto income disclosure reactions


Disclosures

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Frontier – Inside Wall Street’s bitcoin playbook with Denny Galindo
item.description:
Denny is a wealth manager and bitcoin research lead at Morgan Stanley, where he bridges traditional finance and bitcoin for high-net-worth investors. He operates inside one of the world’s largest financial institutions while developing frameworks to help advisors understand and allocate to bitcoin.

In this episode, Denny joins The Bitcoin Frontier to share how investors should think about bitcoin in a portfolio, the three core investor buckets driving adoption, and his thoughts on determining whether you’re underweight or overweight bitcoin. We dig into bitcoin’s market cycles and seasonal framework, the role of global money supply in driving returns, and practical strategies for gaining exposure in a volatile asset.

SUPPORT THE PODCAST:
 → Subscribe
 → Leave a review
 → Share the show with your friends and family
 → Send us an email: podcast@unchained.com
 → Learn more about Unchained: https://unchained.com/?utm_source=you...
→ Book a free call with a bitcoin expert: https://unchained.com/consultation?ut...

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 – Intro & Denny’s role bridging traditional finance and bitcoin
2:00 – From equity research to leading bitcoin insights at Morgan Stanley
4:20 – The three investor buckets: digital gold, venture, and diversifier
7:30 – How institutions evaluate volatility and correlation
10:50 – Where bitcoin fits in portfolios today (risk asset vs store of value)
14:00 – How to determine if you’re underweight or overweight bitcoin
18:00 – Why most investors are still early (0–4% allocation range)
21:40 – Will the three investor frameworks converge over time?
23:10 – Bitcoin cycles: macro liquidity vs halving-driven supply shocks
26:30 – Using cycles for rebalancing vs long-term holding strategies
31:20 – Tail risks: quantum computing and “earthquake” scenarios
36:10 – Bitcoin as a global store of value and M2-driven returns
41:10 – Modeling long-term returns: monetary expansion + adoption
48:30 – How to build a position: dollar-cost averaging and timing
52:15 – Seasons of bitcoin: winter, spring, and portfolio adjustments
55:00 – What it takes for bitcoin to become a standard portfolio allocation

WHERE TO FOLLOW US:
→ Unchained X: https://x.com/unchained
→ Unchained LinkedIn:   / unchainedcom 
→ Unchained Newsletter: https://unchained.com/newsletter
→ Denny Galindo’s Twitter: https://x.com/DennyGalindo 
→ Timot Lamarre’s Twitter: https://x.com/TimotLamarre 


]]>

item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast – After the AI Buildout, the AI Economy Will Run on Bitcoin Collateral | Eric Jackson
item.description:
Eric Jackson joins Joe Burnett to explain why he believes bitcoin could reach $50 million as AI agents transform global commerce and demand pristine digital collateral. They also discuss bitcoin’s recent underperformance, AI-powered market models, compounding through volatility, and why the next five years may be the most uncertain investing environment of our lifetimes.


Timestamps:

0:00 - Eric Jackson’s background in markets

2:14 - Finding Carvana before the comeback

3:01 - The OpenDoor trade and retail investor momentum

3:40 - How Eric got interested in bitcoin and crypto

6:26 - Building AI models before ChatGPT

9:23 - Volatility, conviction, and long-term investing

12:16 - Why Eric thinks bitcoin could reach $50 million

17:01 - Bitcoin as the “other coin” of the AI trade

17:28 - Why bitcoin has underperformed gold and AI stocks

20:16 - Is the AI boom propping up the market?

22:03 - What the world could look like in 2041

25:55 - AI, uncertainty, and the next five years

28:47 - Kevin Warsh, interest rates, and bitcoin

31:37 - Eric’s bitcoin stress indicator

40:27 - Compounding through bitcoin volatility

43:35 - Can markets be predicted with enough data?

48:20 - How AI changed market analysis

50:44 - Event Horizon IQ and AI-powered predictions

54:15 - Final thoughts and where to follow Eric

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie – Journalist Exposes WEF Agenda for Digital Control Matrix | Efrat Fenigson
item.description:
Is sovereignty still possible in an increasingly digital world?


Efrat Fenigson explores growing tensions between individual freedom and centralised control with digital IDs, surveillance systems, and CBDCs.

Governments and institutions are expanding their influence across money, communication, and personal data. Sovereignty can no longer be viewed as just a financial issue. It must be built across every layer of life. Physical, digital, and spiritual.

⚠️ The battle for freedom may not be fought through politics alone, but through the public resisting the system itself.


CONNECT WITH EFRAT FENIGSON

item.title: Blockspace: AI & Bitcoin – MARA’s $600M Texas Acquisition, PUC/ERCOT’s New Data Center Rules, Hunterbrook’s Bloom Energy Short Report
item.description:
Welcome back to The Blockspace Podcast! The Texas Public Utilities Commission held a meeting today that will decide just how much data centers pay for grid infrastructure, and we cover MARA’s acquisition of a 1,200 acre site in Texas that could scale up to 2 GW. Plus, we unpack Hunterbrook’s latest report on Bloom Energy, which questions the company’s reliance on a Scandium supply chain dominated by China, and we close on IREN’s Chairman pushing back on criticism against a new stock package for the company’s co-CEOs.

Check out Dimetrics, the AI industry’s Bloomberg terminal. Track financial metrics and news for AI stocks, GPU rental prices, state-by-state data center pushback, and more with the compute industry’s most powerful dashboard.

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates for all of our shows and content.

👉CleanSpark (Nasdaq: CLSK), a market-leading data center developer with a proven track record of success.

👉Luxor, Blockspace's preferred mining pool. Start hashing today with Luxor!

👉Lygos Finance, Borrow against your Bitcoin, without compromising on custody.

Energy Investors Forum is coming to Dallas on July 23, bringing together executives, operators, fund managers and investors across AI infrastructure, energy markets, data centers and bitcoin mining.

If you follow the business of power, compute and digital infrastructure, EIF is built to help you understand where these markets are heading and who is shaping them.

BlockSpace listeners can get 30% off all tickets with code BSP30 at checkout.

Register here: https://www.energyinvestorsforum.com/

Use code: BSP30

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Der Bitcoin-Bärenmarkt zeigt bereits seine Zähne, mit Alex von Frankenberg | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #126
item.description:
Alex von Frankenberg ist seit Kurzem als Vollzeit-Bitcoiner aktiv und hat soeben sein Buch ins Englische übersetzt. In der Vergangenheit war er als VC-Investor aktiv, aber er hat sich entschieden, mehr in der Community aktiv zu werden.

Im Gespräch mit Relai-CEO Julian Liniger spricht Alex über den aktuellen Bitcoin-Bärenmarkt, wie er die Lage mit Bitcoin-Treasury-Firmen sieht, weshalb er sein Buch auf Englisch übersetzt hat und wohin die Reise in Zukunft geht.

Folge Alex auf X: https://x.com/Justdoitalex

Kaufe Alex’s Buch hier: https://www.amazon.de/-/en/Bitcoin-Geldentwertung-Technologie-Inflation-Finanzkrisen/dp/3949098593/

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:40 - Wie schätzt Alex den Markt aktuell ein?

08:14 - Der Wettbewerb macht es schwer für Bitcoin

14:30 - Die Schere zwischen Arm und Reich wird immer grösser

17:01 - Wie schätzt Alex die Situation mit Strategy ein?

21:04 - Werbeunterbrechung für die Relai-App

23:40 - Warum gibt es eigentlich keine Gold-Reserve-Firmen?

29:10 - Ist langfristig in Bitcoin zu investieren immer noch das Beste?

37:18 - Wieso hat Alex sein Buch geschrieben und was ist die Kernbotschaft?

43:50 - Outro

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören?

🎧Auf Apple Podcast anhören:

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691

🎧Auf Spotify anhören:

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437d

—

Die in der Sendung geäusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen Gäste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast können ohne Vorankündigung geändert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollständig oder aktuell sind.

—

🎓 Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

🧠 Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Kostenloser wöchentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

👀 Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Folge uns:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/relai

Haftungsausschluss: Relai ist gemäss dem MiCA-Regulierungsrahmen berechtigt, Krypto-Asset-Dienstleistungen in der Schweiz und in der gesamten Europäischen Union anzubieten. Nach Abschluss der Passporting-Verfahren baut das Unternehmen seine Dienstleistungen aktiv auf weitere EU-Mitgliedstaaten aus.

Bitcoin #Finanzen #Investieren #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinWissen

]]>

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #192 - Amy Webb - The Future of Work, AI & Human Labor
item.description:
Amy Webb joins me to discuss why artificial intelligence is not just another technology shift, but a civilisation-level reordering of work, power, wealth, biology and society.


Amy explains why the real AI question is not simply which jobs disappear, but which people become vulnerable. We discuss thinkers vs think-nots, why human capital may stop being the main driver of productivity and wealth, how GDP and unemployment could rise together, and why the economy may thrive while having less use for human labour.


We also get into China’s AI strategy, why governments are failing to plan for the transition, whether AI companies owe people for the data and knowledge they have absorbed, Amy’s idea of contribution credit, the limits of UBI, the future of synthetic biology and longevity, and why the current structures of regulation, politics and economics no longer make sense for the world we are entering.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -


TIMESTAMPS:

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Spotlight Series Ep. 2: Rep. Nick Begich
item.description:
Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK) reached Congress by an unusual route: founding software companies and holding Bitcoin since 2013. BPI's David Zell sat down with him at PubKey to talk about how a builder's instincts shape the way he legislates, his bill to give the U.S. a strategic Bitcoin reserve, and the policy questions AI is raising faster than Washington can answer them.


The conversation runs from Begich's 440 coins on Mt. Gox, to the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA), the ~93-year cycle of global reserve currencies, the "untethering" of money from scarcity, and why he believes AI's hardest problem is the "disintermediation of purpose" rather than unemployment. They close on UBI, Alaska's Permanent Fund as a model of citizen ownership, and what's next for the budget and healthcare.


Guest: Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK)

Host: David Zell, Bitcoin Policy Institute

Recorded at PubKey


CHAPTERS

0:00 Intro: A Founder Comes to Congress

1:21 From Baylor to Ford to Building a Software Company

5:17 Finding Bitcoin in 2013 & Surviving Mt. Gox

6:44 The Founder's Mindset vs. the Zero-Sum Worldview

13:56 ARMA: The Case for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve

19:25 The "Untethering Event": Scarcity, Inflation & the Debt Spiral

25:58 AI's Promise, Peril & the "Disintermediation of Purpose"

31:59 Open-Source AI, China & Catastrophic Misuse Risk

39:14 Drawing the Regulatory Line & the "Bitcoin of AI"

42:25 UBI vs. Alaska's Permanent Fund: "Universal Basic Investment"

49:43 What's Next: The Budget, Healthcare & Quantum


#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #ARMA #NickBegich #AIPolicy #DigitalAssets #StrategicBitcoinReserve #BPI #Crypto #MonetaryPolicy

]]>

item.title: Der Bitcoin Kompass: Wegweiser im Kaninchenbau – Folge 5: Der Bitcoin-Preis – Zwischen Angebot, Nachfrage und Geldpolitik
item.description:
Was bestimmt eigentlich den Bitcoin-Preis? In Folge 5 vom Bitcoin-Kompass sprechen wir üeber eines der meistdiskutierten Themen im Bitcoin-Space: den Preis. Dabei geht es nicht um Prognosen oder Kaufempfehlungen, sondern um ein grundlegendes Verständnis dafüer, wie der Bitcoin-Preis entsteht und welche Kraefte ihn beeinflussen.


Wir erklären, wie Angebot und Nachfrage auf Bitcoin-Börsen funktionieren, warum das Handelsvolumen oft wichtiger ist als der Preis selbst und welche Rolle die Marktkapitalisierung spielt. Ausserdem beleuchten wir die grossen Einflussfaktoren: das Bitcoin-Halving und den Vier-Jahres-Zyklus, die Geldpolitik der US-Notenbank (Fed), Inflation und die wachsenden Staatsschulden der USA. Im Vergleich zwischen Bitcoin und Gold zeigen sie, warum Bitcoin technologisch ueberlegen sein könnte - und warum der Preis letztlich ein Spiegel des wachsenden Vertrauens in diese neue Technologie ist.


Mehr Infos, interaktive Grafiken zur Marktkapitalisierung und Kontaktmoeglichkeiten findet ihr auf:


Webseite: https://derbitcoinkompass.ch

E-Mail: kontakt@derbitcoinkompass.ch

Telegram: https://t.me/btc_kaninchenbau


Feedback und Fragen gerne per E-Mail, ueber Telegram oder ueber unsere Webseite.



(00:00:00) Begruessung & Einfuehrung ins Thema Preis

(00:01:31) Volatilitaet und der aktuelle Bitcoin-Preis

(00:02:33) Kaufkraft, Inflation und warum Menschen investieren

(00:05:20) Marktkapitalisierung: Bitcoin vs. Gold vs. Immobilien vs. Aktien

(00:08:05) Wie entsteht der Bitcoin-Preis? Angebot & Nachfrage erklaert

(00:11:04) Warum das Handelsvolumen entscheidend ist

(00:12:43) Die grossen Einflussfaktoren auf den Bitcoin-Preis

(00:13:26) In was messen wir den Preis? Euro, Dollar oder Aepfel?

(00:17:03) Warum Geld kein stabiler Massstab ist

(00:18:10) Bitcoins festes Angebot: Maximal 21 Millionen

(00:20:02) Das Halving und der Vier-Jahres-Zyklus

(00:24:22) Die Fed, Zinspolitik und US-Staatsschulden

(00:31:27) Was bedeutet das alles fuer den Bitcoin-Preis?

(00:33:37) Bitcoin vs. Gold: Vorteile und Unterschiede

(00:40:30) Preisprognose: Bitcoin auf 1 Million Dollar?

(00:41:54) Zusammenfassung & Verabschiedung

]]>

item.title: The Pomp Podcast – How To Invest In OpenAI and Anthropic Before They Go Public | Ankur Nagpal
item.description:
Ankur Nagpal is the GP of USVC, a publicly accessible venture capital fund. In this conversation, we break down how retail investors can now access private markets like OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX for as little as $500, and the controversy around USVC's Anduril investment, portfolio strategy, QSBS, tax alpha, and what it means to build wealth in America. 

====================

Looking for a better place to trade? BloFin gives traders access to deep liquidity, advanced futures products for crypto AND TradFi assets, fast execution, and a clean, intuitive interface—all in one platform. To celebrate their partnership with us, they're giving away $100,000 in Deposit & Trade Rewards. Deposit, trade, and earn rewards based on your activity during the campaign. Check them out at (https://partner.blofin.com/d/Pomp).

====================

BitcoinIRA: Save up to 37% in capital gains taxes on your retirement investments. Take 3 minutes to open your account & get connected to a team of IRA specialists that will guide you through every step of the process. Go to lp.bitcoinira.com/after-crypto to win up to $4,000 in rewards.

====================

Arch Public is an agentic trading platform that automates the buying and selling of your preferred crypto strategies. Sign up today at https://www.archpublic.com and start your automated trading strategy for free. No catch. No hidden fees. Just smarter trading.

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO – 19) ... Schutz vor Inflation
item.description:
Was genau ist eigentlich Inflation? Mit der Definition dieses wichtigen Begriffs fangen die Probleme schon an. Denn da prallen verschiedene Auslegungen aufeinander. Es ist unumstritten, dass durch Inflation die Preise ansteigen. Aber was sind die Ursachen?

In dieser Folge von „bitcoin ist...“

  • Wie die Zentralbanken sich mit der Umdeutung des Begriffs mehr Spielraum verschaffen. Denn wie die Inflation definiert wird bestimmt darüber, wie sie wahrgenommen wird. Die EZB nimmt sich dabei als "Täter" heraus und bezeichnet Inflation als "allgemeinen Anstieg des Preisniveaus", obwohl sie selbst die Geldmenge ausweitet!


  • Woher kommt Inflation? Natürlich ist die Ausweitung der Geldmenge nicht der einzige Grund für den Anstieg der Preise - aber dafür ein wesentlicher Treiber eines kontinuierlich hohem Inflationsniveaus.


  • Was bedeutet ein Anstieg der Inflation von 2 % auf 3 %? Es klingt nach wenig – so, als ob der Anstieg nur 1 % beträgt. Aber in Wirklichkeit steigen die Preise ab jetzt um 50 % schneller an (während die absoluten Preise natürlich nicht um 50 % springen).


Bitcoin kommt in dieser Folge wieder nur am Rand vor. Aber eines sollte klar sein: ein Gut, dass sich nicht inflationieren lässt, schützt deine Kaufkraft langfristig gut.

„ Inflation ist kein Zustand, sondern eine Beschleunigung der Entwertung. Die Inflationsrate beschreibt eine Geschwindigkeit, mit der die Preise über einen Zeitraum ansteigen. “


Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kanälen: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: möchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar.

Danke, Dein Christian.

]]>
item.itunes:summary:
Was genau ist eigentlich Inflation? Mit der Definition dieses wichtigen Begriffs fangen die Probleme schon an. Denn da prallen verschiedene Auslegungen aufeinander. Es ist unumstritten, dass durch Inflation die Preise ansteigen. Aber was sind die Ursachen?

In dieser Folge von „bitcoin ist...“

  • Wie die Zentralbanken sich mit der Umdeutung des Begriffs mehr Spielraum verschaffen. Denn wie die Inflation definiert wird bestimmt darüber, wie sie wahrgenommen wird. Die EZB nimmt sich dabei als "Täter" heraus und bezeichnet Inflation als "allgemeinen Anstieg des Preisniveaus", obwohl sie selbst die Geldmenge ausweitet!


  • Woher kommt Inflation? Natürlich ist die Ausweitung der Geldmenge nicht der einzige Grund für den Anstieg der Preise - aber dafür ein wesentlicher Treiber eines kontinuierlich hohem Inflationsniveaus.


  • Was bedeutet ein Anstieg der Inflation von 2 % auf 3 %? Es klingt nach wenig – so, als ob der Anstieg nur 1 % beträgt. Aber in Wirklichkeit steigen die Preise ab jetzt um 50 % schneller an (während die absoluten Preise natürlich nicht um 50 % springen).


Bitcoin kommt in dieser Folge wieder nur am Rand vor. Aber eines sollte klar sein: ein Gut, dass sich nicht inflationieren lässt, schützt deine Kaufkraft langfristig gut.

„ Inflation ist kein Zustand, sondern eine Beschleunigung der Entwertung. Die Inflationsrate beschreibt eine Geschwindigkeit, mit der die Preise über einen Zeitraum ansteigen. “


Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kanälen: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: möchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar.

Danke, Dein Christian.

item.title: Bitcoin Bundesverband Podcast – #2 Vorstandsvorstellung
item.description:
Am 26. September 2024 wurde der ⁠Bitcoin Bundesverband⁠ offiziell gegründet, und der erste Vorstand wurde gewählt. Zum Vorstandsvorsitzenden wurde Philipp Hartmannsgruber ernannt, sein Stellvertreter ist Daniel Wingen, und Matthias Steger übernimmt das Amt des Finanzvorstands. Weitere Vorstandsmitglieder sind Evelyn Brock, Jens Leinert, Dr. Mathias Linkerhand und Lars Eichhorst. In dieser Folge stellt sich das Team vor.


Bitcoin Bundesverband (BTCBV)

Website⁠ | ⁠Telegram⁠ | ⁠X⁠ | ⁠LinkedIn⁠ | ⁠Nostr⁠

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Optech Podcast – Bitcoin Optech: Newsletter #412 Recap
item.description:
Mark “Murch” Erhardt and Mike Schmidt are joined by Conduition and Jeremy Rubin to discuss Newsletter #412.


Changing consensus

● Benchmarking SLH-DSA STARK aggregation (1:05)

● Bird of Prey 2 (BoP-2) non-malleable schnorr and PQ signatures (10:21)

● Lattice-based signatures (19:41)

● Public key recovery for P2MR EC leaves (25:50)

● Aligning privacy incentives in P2MR (30:48)

● Prohibit merkle internal node preimages that encode minimal 64-byte transactions (49:38)

● Triggering EC disabling with a NUMS point spend or hashrate majority (37:36)


Releases and release candidates

● Bitcoin Core 31.1rc1 (1:32:43)

● Bitcoin Core 30.3rc1 (1:32:48)

● Bitcoin Core 29.4rc1 (1:32:52)

● Core Lightning v26.06.2 (1:36:01)

● LND v0.20.2-beta.rc1 (1:36:39)

● LND v0.21.1-beta (1:38:10)

● LDK v0.2.4 (1:38:57)


Notable code and documentation changes

● Bitcoin Core #35266 (1:40:00)

● Bitcoin Core #35550 (1:41:10)

● Bitcoin Core #35610 (1:42:15)

● BIPs #2196 (1:43:52)

● BIPs #2165 (1:47:46)

● BIPs #2201 (1:50:13)

● LND #10900 (1:51:20)

● LND #10927 (1:52:37)

● LDK #4748 (1:54:13)

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – Your Paper Bitcoin Is Basically Worthless | George Bodine | BIS #210
item.description:
George Bodine joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about Bitcoin self-custody, running a node, and why paper Bitcoin held through treasury companies and ETFs carries counterparty risk that real cold storage does not. Knut and George dig into the Core versus Knots debate, BIP-110, the power law disagreement, and the risks facing Bitcoin treasury companies as financialization accelerates. Along the way they explore creativity as the opposite of productivity, the discipline of dropping your ego, and what a life of integrity looks like through the eyes of an artist and former fighter pilot.

Connect with George:

https://x.com/Jethroe111

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends – #60 Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung - mit dem Bitcoin-Banker Pascal Eberle
item.description:
*** Werbung: PostFinance Krypto Newsletter ***

Der Krypto-Markt schläft nie. Jede Woche passiert etwas Neues rund um Bitcoin, Ethereum und Co. Der monatliche Newsletter von PostFinance ordnet die wichtigsten Entwicklungen kompakt ein, damit du den Überblick behältst, ohne lange zu suchen. Abonnieren direkt im E-Finance oder hier: Krypto-Newsletter abonnieren | PostFinance

https://www.postfinance.ch/de/privat/anlegen/moeglichkeiten/krypto/newsletter-abonnieren.html#/category?groupId=newsletter_krypto

***

Bitcoin als Lebenseinstellung, der Markt im Tief und die Bitcoinisierung der Finanzwelt

Rino Borini spricht mit Pascal Eberle, Chief of Staff bei Sygnum Bank und Co-Lead von Bitcoin at Sygnum, über Proof of Work als Alltagsprinzip, das blutende Preisschild bei starkem Fundament und die Produktwelt einer Digital Asset Bank.

Die Kernthemen:

  • Bitcoin-Prinzipien wie tiefe Zeitpräferenz und stay humble, stack sats wirken weit über die Wallet hinaus, bis in Sport, Sparen und Familie.
  • Bei knapp 60'000 Dollar sieht der Preis schlecht aus, doch institutionelle Adoption und Netzwerksicherheit waren laut Eberle noch nie so stark.
  • Geld funktioniert in Schichten: Bitcoin ist der sichere Base Layer, Lightning erledigen den Alltag.
  • Von Verwahrung über Transfer und Lending bis zu Bitcoin-Hypotheken: wie Banken die Bitcoinisierung umsetzen.

Im Talk erwähnt:

  • Nick Bhatia, Layered Money (Buch)
  • Jeff Booth, The Price of Tomorrow (Buch)
  • Douglas Adams, The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (Buch)
  • Gigi, "Bitcoin is Time" (Essay, dergigi.com)

Abonniere den House of Satoshi Newsletter für monatliche Bitcoin-Insights. http://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/newsletter


--------------------------------

Disclaimer: Dieser Inhalt dient der Information und Bildung und ist keine Anlage-, Steuer- oder Rechtsberatung. Bitcoin und Krypto sind volatil, du kannst dein eingesetztes Kapital verlieren. Mach deine eigene Recherche und entscheide selbst.

]]>

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – Lyn Alden: Bitcoin's Next Move, Strategy's STRC Volatility & the Protocol Debate
item.description:
Has Bitcoin finally hit bottom? This week, one of the most trusted names in macro gives her honest read on where we are — and where we go from here.

Lyn Alden returns to cut through the noise: why hard assets like Bitcoin and gold have been left behind, and why she says no rescue is coming — Bitcoin has to prove itself on its own. She also breaks down the volatility around Strategy's digital credit and the protocol fight dividing the Bitcoin community.

We discuss:

  • Whether Bitcoin has hit its floor — and the lowest sentiment Lyn's ever seen
  • Why Bitcoin proxies and leveraged products can't replace real, self-custodied Bitcoin
  • What actually happened with Strategy's $STRC — and how worried holders should be
  • Her grounded take on the protocol wars, and why the "existential threat" talk is overblown
  • Why the big money print everyone's waiting for still isn't coming

Follow Lyn Alden on X (@LynAldenContact) and at lynalden.com

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 034 Matt Corallo: Bitcoin Has One Shot at the AI Economy - Here's How to Win I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
AI agents are about to start using money.

Will they use Visa, stablecoins… or Bitcoin?

Bitcoin developer Matt Corallo explains why AI could become Bitcoin’s biggest opportunity—or its biggest threat. From Lightning wallets and agentic payments to open-source AI, quantum computing, mining decentralization, and the future of money, this conversation explores what happens when machines become economic actors.

Bitcoin #AIAgents #Lightning #BitcoinDevelopment #MattCorallo #AIPayments

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber – #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte über ihre Eindrücke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die alltägliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Präsident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom täglichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielfältigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen Tätigkeiten.

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – What does the woke left TRULY worship?
item.description:
The extreme left often claims to follow logic and "the science". But I've noticed a glaring pattern that contradicts this. And once you see it, you can't unsee it.

In this Take, I share my thoughts on the "holy trinity" the woke left actually worships. It starts with treating other people's money like magic. But seizing wealth is just the beginning. I break down the dangerous obsession with political authority and blind submission driving this hostile new religion.

item.title: Münzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – Unter Geldwäscheverdacht Episode 6 (mit Plep4Fun)
item.description:
Konto gesperrt. Komplett. Kein Überweisen, kein Abheben, kein gar nichts. Und das ohne Vorwarnung, ohne Erklärung, einfach so. 


Genau das hat Pleb4Fun im Januar 2025 erwischt. Von einer Sekunde auf die andere war er raus aus dem System – während Rechnungen weiterhin kamen und das Leben sich nicht um sein Bankproblem scherte. 
Was dann folgte, war kein schneller Anruf mit happy ending. Es war ein bürokratischer Alptraum, der eine viel unbequemere Frage aufwirft: Wie leicht gerät man heutzutage eigentlich ins Visier der Behörden, obwohl man absolut nichts falsch gemacht hat? 


Chefermittler Mavi hat sich mit Pleb4Fun zusammengesetzt und die ganze Geschichte auseinandergenommen – akribisch, ehrlich und ohne Schönfärberei. Raus gekommen ist dabei eine Episode, die unter die Haut geht. Nicht weil sie reißerisch ist, sondern weil es Realität ist.


Geldwäscheverdacht. Ein Begriff, den die meisten Menschen mit Kriminellen verbinden. Nicht mit jemandem, der einfach seinen Alltag lebt. 
Das hier ist keine abstrakte Diskussion über Finanzgesetze. Das ist die Geschichte eines Menschen, der plötzlich beweisen musste, dass er kein Verbrecher ist – und das Protokoll dazu liegt jetzt auf dem Tisch. 

Links zur Folge:
Pleb4Fun Dokumentation auf X

Ticketverkauf Event Brivat (Bitcoin Privacy Event)

Der Fall Samourai

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:
npub14cz50cvahflq8kpe57qxnnvgmveyng6l8fdtessdqm8ht9fcly3qjd20ry

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io]]>

item.title: State of Bitcoin with Brandon Keys – The European Bitcoin Ban Hiding In Plain Sight with Matyas Kuchar - State of Bitcoin Ep. 238
item.description:
Until last year, more than 1,000 restaurants in Czech Republic accepted Bitcoin. Then it all stopped.

The MiCA regulation didn't ban Bitcoin in Europe. It did something far more effective — it made the rails impossible to operate. And as the Czech merchant economy quietly disappeared, two bigger forces started moving in the background: the petrodollar dying, and CBDCs coming online in Europe THIS YEAR.

In this episode, I sit down with Matyas Kuchar — co-founder of BTC Prague, the largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe, and one of the most thoughtful voices on European Bitcoin policy — to break down why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe, why the European surveillance state is spreading faster than Americans realize, and why he believes Bitcoin must win because the alternative is just so much worse.

You'll learn:

→ How MiCA quietly killed 1,000+ Bitcoin-accepting restaurants in Czech Republic — and why it wasn't even a direct ban

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

→ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR — and why most Americans haven't heard about it

→ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

→ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians — and what changed his mind

→ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings — it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

🚨 JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe — June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

🎯 PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

🎯 PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy — estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

🎯 MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

📊 REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

• MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) — Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

• Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

• Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

• BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

• Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

• EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

• BTC Prague 2026 conference — June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

]]>

→ Why Czech Republic became the Bitcoin capital of Europe (Trezor, Slush Pool, BIP-39, General Bytes — all started in Prague)

→ Why the petrodollar is dying — and what the loss of US hegemony means for global decentralization

→ Why Europeans use Bitcoin as money while Americans treat it as digital gold — and which approach is right

→ The European CBDC threat: pilots are launching THIS YEAR — and why most Americans haven't heard about it

→ The CBDC mechanism in Matyas's words: "You can analyze, you can control, you can surveil, you can send from a helicopter"

→ Why even an anarcho-capitalist now meets with politicians — and what changed his mind

→ Why Bitcoin is no longer just savings — it's the network of people building the future you actually want to live in

🚨 JOIN ME AT BTC PRAGUE 2026

The largest Bitcoin-only conference in Europe — June 11-13. Use code GREENCANDLE for discounted tickets:

https://btcprague.com/

🎯 PROTECT YOUR BITCOIN WITH SALT LENDING

Borrow against your Bitcoin without selling a single sat. Green Candle viewers get an exclusive offer:

https://saltlending.com/green-candle

🎯 PLAN YOUR WEALTH WITH STRONG WEALTH

Build a Bitcoin-aligned wealth strategy — estate planning, tax optimization, portfolio construction:

https://strongwealth.net/

🎯 MINE BITCOIN WITH SIMPLE MINING

First-year repairs free for Green Candle listeners:

https://simplemining.io/green-candle

📊 REFERENCED IN THIS EPISODE

• MiCA regulation (EU 2023/1114) — Markets in Crypto-Assets framework

• Czech Republic Bitcoin tax exemption (3-year hold rule)

• Slush Pool (founded 2010 in Prague, first ever Bitcoin mining pool)

• BIP-39 seed phrase standard (developed in Prague)

• Trezor hardware wallet (first ever, founded in Prague)

• EU CBDC pilot programs (launching 2026)

• BTC Prague 2026 conference — June 11-13

Bitcoin #BTCPrague #Matyas #MiCA #BitcoinEurope #CBDC #BitcoinPolicy #EuropeanBitcoin #BitcoinConference #SoundMoney #Petrodollar #BitcoinAdoption #CzechRepublic #FinancialFreedom #BitcoinNews

🔔 SUBSCRIBE for weekly Bitcoin, macro, and personal finance content.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Always do your own research.

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Episode #4: Der Krypto-Tresor – Wie du deine Coins sicher nach Hause holst
item.description:
Willkommen zurück zu einer neuen Podcast-Folge! 🎙️

Episode #4: Der Krypto-Tresor – Wie du deine Coins sicher nach Hause holst

Der Kauf ist abgeschlossen, die Satoshis liegen im Account der Krypto-Börse. Julian denkt, er hat es geschafft. Doch Max muss ihm die bittere Realität der Krypto-Welt erklären: Solange das Geld auf der Börse liegt, hast du nur einen Schuldschein. Geht die Börse pleite, ist das Geld unwiderruflich weg.

In dieser Episode der Krypto Corner sprechen wir über den ultimativen Schritt zur finanziellen Souveränität. Wir holen die Coins nach Hause. Max stellt der Berliner WG die "Hardware-Wallet" vor – den absoluten Goldstandard der Krypto-Sicherheit.

In dieser Folge erfährst du: • Warum du Börsen niemals als langfristiges Lager für deine Coins nutzen solltest. • Den Unterschied zwischen Hot Wallets (Apps) und Cold Wallets (Hardware-Sticks). • Wie du eine Krypto-Überweisung machst, ohne aus Versehen dein ganzes Geld ins Nichts zu schicken. • Den ultimativen Profi-Tipp: Warum du immer eine kleine Test-Transaktion machen musst.

Diese Episode basiert auf Kapitel 4 des Einsteiger-Romans „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten. Band 1“ von Sascha Swen Heiter. Verantwortung steht über Spekulation. Bleib sicher und investiere mit Köpfchen!

📚 Das Buch zur Show: Wenn du das gesamte Wissen sofort anwenden möchtest – von der Einrichtung deiner Hardware Wallets über die Nutzung von Burner Wallets bis hin zu wichtigen rechtlichen und steuerlichen Themen in der DACH-Region – hol dir das komplette Buch! 👉 https://amzn.eu/d/06DuLLUw

🎧 Krypto Corner Podcast: Hörst du diese Folge gerade auf YouTube? Du findest den Krypto Corner Podcast auch auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts und überall sonst, für regelmäßige Deep-Dives und Sicherheits-Updates für unterwegs!

👇 Unterstütze den Kanal: Wenn dir diese Folge geholfen hat, lass ein Abo da, gib dem Video einen Daumen nach oben und aktiviere die Glocke. Feedback, Fragen oder Themenwünsche? Ab damit in die Kommentare!

⚖️ Rechtliche Hinweise / Haftungsausschluss: Die in diesem Podcast geteilten Inhalte dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information sowie der Unterhaltung und stellen keine Anlage-, Rechts- oder Steuerberatung dar. Investitionen in Kryptowährungen sind hochriskant und können zu einem Totalverlust des eingesetzten Kapitals führen. Jeder Hörer und Zuschauer handelt absolut eigenverantwortlich. Besonders bei steuerlichen Themen ist zu beachten, dass die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen sehr komplex ist. Bitte konsultiere für die aktuell geltende Rechtslage in der DACH-Region zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater. Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

#Podcast #KryptoCorner #HardwareWallet #KryptoSicherheit #ColdWallet #Krypto #KryptoVerstehen #Bitcoin #KryptoAnfänger #Finanzwissen #Blockchain #Kapitel4



]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast – Andrew Webley Met Michael Saylor In London — Here's The One Piece Of Advice He Got
item.description:
Andrew Webley IPO'd The Smarter Web Company in April 2025 when nobody in the UK believed a Bitcoin treasury model would work. Fourteen months later, SWC has raised nearly a quarter of a billion pounds, holds 2,878 BTC, uplisted to the London Stock Exchange, achieved FTSE index inclusion, and acquired Squarebird Agency — and Andrew says the best is still ahead and he can't talk about it yet.

He covers the full origin story, what Saylor told him when they met in London, why the UK is the perfect market for Bitcoin preferred equity, what he learned watching STRC and SATA get stress-tested, why FTSE 250 is in touching distance, and his one-sentence answer to every Bitcoin treasury critic.

Follow Andrew: ⁠https://twitter.com/@ASJWebley⁠ Learn more: ⁠https://smarterwebcompany.co.uk⁠

 

CHAPTERS:

00:00 Cold Open

01:35 Andrew's Journey with Bitcoin and Smarter Web Company

09:06 The SWC IPO & Initial Challenges

14:07 Building A Strong Shareholder Base & Community

19:47 Optionality and Mergers & Acquisitions

29:23 Market Positioning In The UK (FTSE 250 & Beyond)

34:13 Preferred Equities In Europe

38:16 Learning From Michael Saylor & Strategy

46:27 The Evolution of STRC & Digital Credit

53:18 Competition Between Bitcoin Treasuries

56:53 Addressing Criticism in the Bitcoin Community

1:02:39 Stay Orange

 

🏛️ Institutional custody & OTC at bit.ly/bitGo

🔒 Secure your Bitcoin with COLDCARD — use code 6BT for 6% off at bit.ly/coinkiteStore

🏦 Borrow against your BTC from 8.49% at bit.ly/archlending

💼 Bitcoin executive recruitment at bit.ly/XCEio ⚡️ Bitcoin yield without leaving custody at bit.ly/hemiXYZ

 

📊 Track every Bitcoin treasury company at bitcointreasuries.net

 

⚠️ Not financial advice. Do your own research.

 

🟠 Stay Orange.

 

]]>

item.title: Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies – Vitalik Buterin on The Economic Zone (EEZ) Ep. 642
item.description:
In this special episode, we revisit a fireside conversation between Vitalik Buterin and Friederike Ernst at DappCon 2026 in Berlin. They explore the Ethereum Economic Zone (EEZ), a new vision for Ethereum built around synchronous composability, app chains, and real-time proving.


Following the fireside, Sebastien and Friederike break down the ideas behind the EEZ and discuss what this new paradigm could mean for Ethereum's future.


Topics covered include:

• The Ethereum Economic Zone and synchronous composability

• App chains, privacy networks, and prediction markets

• Ethereum as an economic operating system for the internet

• Sequencing, MEV, and shared liquidity across chains

• Enterprise, government, and institutional use cases

• Why this approach differs from Cosmos, Polkadot, and other ecosystem visions

• The future of Ethereum beyond rollup fragmentation


Links:

Lido: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter


Sponsors:

Lido V3 introduces stVaults: a modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer.


Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter

Block Space Forum: https://blockspace.forum/


NEAR AI Cloud now lets developers deploy OpenClaw—the rapidly growing open-source AI agent platform—inside Trusted Execution Environments, providing hardware-level encryption with cryptographic attestations. With OpenClaw on NEAR AI Cloud, you can run agents with cloud convenience, but without traditional cloud data exposure. No hardware to manage. No trust assumptions required. Learn more at near.ai.

]]>

item.title: Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin Is the Power Source of Every Company, with Michael Salyor| Relai Bitcoin Podcast #125
item.description:
Michael Saylor is the founder and chairman of Strategy, formerly MicroStrategy. He is the permanent Bitcoin bull and best known for having turned around his firm with Bitcoin into a $100 billion company.

In this live conversation with Relai CEO Julian Liniger, Michael discussed his path as an entrepreneur, what he would do today to start a new company, why Bitcoin is so vital for Strategy, and what digital credit actually is.

The interview was recorded at BTC Prague. Make sure to grab your tickets for next year! https://btcprague.com/

You can follow Michael on X: https://x.com/saylor

—

⏱ Timestamps:

00:00 - Intro

01:25 - How were the early days of Strategy?

18:03 - What would Michael do as a founder today?

35:28 - What happens to Strategy if Bitcoin goes down another 50%?

49:37 - Why did Strategy sell 32 Bitcoin?

59:49 - What would Michael say to people calling the company a systemic risk to Bitcoin?

01:09:35 - Outro

—

Prefer to enjoy this show in audio format?

🎧Listen on Apple Podcast: https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543267066

🎧Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/06BdZid57RlCgBNsgr703A?si=5ec60cc680534b44

--

The opinions expressed on the show are the opinions of the individual guests and may not reflect the opinions of Relai. The information on the podcast may be changed without notice, and is not guaranteed to be correct, complete or up-to-date.

--

🎓 Get Smarter About Bitcoin:

🧠 Free Bitcoin Mini‑Course: https://relai.app/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Free Weekly Bitcoin Newsletter: https://relai.app/newsletter

👀 Need help? Send us a message: https://support.relai.app/en/

Connect with us:

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/relai

Disclaimer: Relai is authorized to provide crypto-asset services in Switzerland and across the European Union under the MiCA regulatory framework. The company is actively expanding its services to EU member states following the completion of passporting notifications.

Bitcoin #Finance #Investing #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinEducation

Michael Saylor is the founder and chairman of Strategy, formerly MicroStrategy. He is the permanent Bitcoin bull and best known for having turned around his firm with Bitcoin into a $100 billion company.

In this live conversation with Relai CEO Julian Liniger, Michael discussed his path as an entrepreneur, what he would do today to start a new company, why Bitcoin is so vital for Strategy, and what digital credit actually is.

The interview was recorded at BTC Prague. Make sure to grab your tickets for next year! https://btcprague.com/

You can follow Michael on X: https://x.com/saylor

—

⏱ Timestamps:

00:00 - Intro

01:25 - How were the early days of Strategy?

18:03 - What would Michael do as a founder today?

35:28 - What happens to Strategy if Bitcoin goes down another 50%?

49:37 - Why did Strategy sell 32 Bitcoin?

59:49 - What would Michael say to people calling the company a systemic risk to Bitcoin?

01:09:35 - Outro

—

Prefer to enjoy this show in audio format?

🎧Listen on Apple Podcast: https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543267066

🎧Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/06BdZid57RlCgBNsgr703A?si=5ec60cc680534b44

--

The opinions expressed on the show are the opinions of the individual guests and may not reflect the opinions of Relai. The information on the podcast may be changed without notice, and is not guaranteed to be correct, complete or up-to-date.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update – Bitcoin Bottom Signal, Trump’s Crypto Fortune & the Token Equity War
item.description: <![CDATA[Bitcoin just had one of its worst months in years, but whales may have been buying the panic.David Sencil and Graham Stone break down Bitcoin’s bounce from the lows, the 270,000 BTC accumulation spike, ETF flows turning positive again, and the broader hard-asset setup as liquidity, gold, and debasement fears return to the conversation.They also discuss Trump’s disclosed $1.4B crypto earnings, why the numbers shocked even crypto natives, how the ethics debate could affect the Clarity Act, and why Venice AI’s $1B valuation has reignited the long-running fight over whether tokens should capture equity-like value.Plus: World Cup betting markets, Polymarket and Kalshi volumes, and the UAE’s push toward regulated local-currency stablecoins.🎧 Follow the podcast for weekly Bitcoin and crypto market insights, and share this episode with someone who wants to stay ahead of the biggest stories shaping the industry.]]>
